ddls:
CREATE TABLE "papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each paper */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the paper */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the paper */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Publication date of the paper */,
  "citation_count" INTEGER /* Number of citations the paper has received */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the paper */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the paper */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the paper */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the paper was published */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the paper in the journal */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the paper */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the paper */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the paper is published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the paper record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the paper record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being cited */,
  "citing_paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper doing the citing */,
  "citation_marker_offset" INTEGER /* Offset of the citation marker */,
  "citation_marker" TEXT /* Text of the citation marker */,
  "citation_offset" INTEGER /* Offset of the citation */,
  "citation_text" TEXT /* Text of the citation */,
  "citation_text_clean" TEXT /* Cleaned text of the citation */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., inline, footnote) */,
  "citation_style" TEXT /* Citation style used (e.g., APA, MLA, Chicago) */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context in which the citation appears in the citing paper */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the citation record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the citation record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the author record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discourse_facets" (
  "facet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discourse facet */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper the facet belongs to */,
  "facet_type" TEXT /* Type of discourse facet (e.g., concept, entity, topic) */,
  "facet_text" TEXT /* Text of the discourse facet */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the discourse facet */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the discourse facet (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the discourse facet record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the discourse facet record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discourse_facets_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discourse_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discourse analysis result */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper the analysis belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of discourse analysis (e.g., sentiment analysis, topic modeling) */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the discourse analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the discourse analysis */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the discourse analysis (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the discourse analysis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the discourse analysis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discourse_analysis_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reference_offsets" (
  "offset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference offset */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper the offset belongs to */,
  "offset_value" TEXT /* Value of the reference offset */,
  "context" TEXT /* Context in which the reference appears in the paper */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reference offset record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the reference offset record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reference_offsets_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("paper_id") REFERENCES papers ("paper_id")
)
